title: Soul Core splitting in NGE
wikitext:
[]: Soul/Core splitting in NGE?             Quote Post by Podferio » Mon Jun 07, 2010 9:10 pm SPLIT from a thread in Rebuild subforum. Moved over to Discussion because the topic turned into soul and core splitting within NGE-verse instead of Rebuild/NME-verse. ~ SSD Sorry to go offtopic but I don't understand some acronyms you guys are using. What's SoL, FoL, GNR, NGE and FAR...

[]:             Quote Post by Yossarian » Mon Jun 07, 2010 9:18 pm SoL: Spear of Longinus or Seed of Life FoL: I actually can't recall this one >_> GNR: Giant Naked Rei NGE: Neon Genesis Evangelion, the title FAR: First Ancestral Race (check the wiki) Hope that helps.

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Mon Jun 07, 2010 9:20 pm SoL: Seed of Life: What Adam and Lilith are, colloquially. They created Angels and Lilin, respectively. Properly it only really refers to Adam. (Lilith is a Seed of Knowledge) FoL: Fruit of Life: The gift Adam's children have received, the S2 Engine inside each one. GNR: Giant Naked Rei: What Rei became in End of Evanglelion (EoE). NGE: Neon Genesis Evangelion. The acronym is in your signature. FAR: First Ancestral Race. The entities who distributed Adam, Lilith, and presumably others across the universe. Lilith and Adam weren't supposed to show up on Earth together. This mistake caused the conflict that drives NGE (Angels vs. Lilin).

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Tue Jun 08, 2010 1:03 am Jinroh wrote: Yes, I'm aware, and that's exactly what I've been saying all along. Correct.

[]:             Quote Post by Jinroh » Tue Jun 08, 2010 3:25 am Does it really sound that confusing? I'm just saying you don't need to extract her body to extract her soul . That's what they do all the time when they change an eva core. They even successfully "found" adam's soul and put it inside Kaworu... So it shouldn't be a big deal extracting Rei's soul from a core.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Tue Jun 08, 2010 8:32 am Oh I'm sorry, I misread. I thought you were advocating that they could bring back Rei without removing her soul. Probably because Rei no longer has a body to extract in any sense of the word.

[]:             Quote Post by sephirotic » Tue Jun 08, 2010 9:14 am Jinroh wrote: Does it really sound that confusing? I'm just saying you don't need to extract her body to extract her soul . That's what they do all the time when they change an eva core. They even successfully "found" adam's soul and put it inside Kaworu... So it shouldn't be a big deal extracting Rei's soul from a core.

[]:             Quote Post by Jinroh » Tue Jun 08, 2010 9:22 am I don't think Lilith ever had a core. Lilins don't have one either. It seems only Angels and Adam have cores.

[]:             Quote Post by sephirotic » Tue Jun 08, 2010 10:40 am Jinroh wrote: I don't think Lilith ever had a core. Lilins don't have one either. It seems only Angels and Adam have cores.

[]:             Quote Post by Jinroh » Tue Jun 08, 2010 10:53 am I don't think either Kaworu or Rei have a core, that's a strange assumption.

[]:             Quote Post by sephirotic » Tue Jun 08, 2010 12:12 pm Jinroh wrote: I don't think either Kaworu or Rei have a core, that's a strange assumption.

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Tue Jun 08, 2010 12:38 pm How'd they move the half of Kyoko's soul that was batshit crazy into the Evangelion after she killed herself? How'd they intend to move the souls of the mothers of the kids in 2-A, what with all of them having dead moms?

[]:             Quote Post by Jinroh » Tue Jun 08, 2010 12:44 pm sephirotic wrote: That doesn't make much sense

[]:             Quote Post by sephirotic » Tue Jun 08, 2010 12:51 pm Legendary wrote: How'd they move the half of Kyoko's soul that was batshit crazy into the Evangelion after she killed herself? How'd they intend to move the souls of the mothers of the kids in 2-A, what with all of them having dead moms?

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Tue Jun 08, 2010 12:55 pm I DID counter your theory. Human beings don't have cores, but their souls are still manipulable.

[]:             Quote Post by sephirotic » Tue Jun 08, 2010 1:02 pm Legendary wrote: I DID counter your theory. Human beings don't have cores, but their souls are still manipulable.

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Tue Jun 08, 2010 1:37 pm Kyoko committed suicide before the other half of her soul was moved. That makes her dead.

[]:             Quote Post by sephirotic » Tue Jun 08, 2010 1:44 pm Legendary wrote: Kyoko committed suicide before the other half of her soul was moved. That makes her dead.

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Tue Jun 08, 2010 1:48 pm The fact that the other half of her soul ("Die with me, Asuka!") is pretty clearly there and just as fucking crazy as it ever was.

[]:             Quote Post by sephirotic » Tue Jun 08, 2010 1:50 pm Legendary wrote: The fact that the other half of her soul ("Die with me, Asuka!") is pretty clearly there and just as fucking crazy as it ever was.
summary:
[]: Soul/Core splitting in NGE?             Quote Post by Podferio » Mon Jun 07, 2010 9:10 pm SPLIT from a thread in Rebuild subforum. Moved over to Discussion because the topic turned into soul and core splitting within NGE-verse instead of Rebuild/NME-verse. ~ SSD Sorry to go offtopic but I don't understand some acronyms you guys are using. What's SoL, FoL, GNR, NGE and FAR...
